Actions.Text: REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Officer Stephen L. Raymond
Summary: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system, consisting of the bridge located on Diamond Point road at exit twenty-three of interstate eighty-seven in the town of Lake George, county of Warren, to Officer Stephen L. Raymond.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to Officer Stephen L. Raymond
